{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206030794AA45D7801490A338F0"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610061738102735678","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"【一本让人想一口气读完的好书】
阅读体验非常舒适！从剧情、人物到文笔，都透露出作者的用心。
- 剧情：张弛有度，既有紧张刺激的冲突，也有温情动人的日常。
- 人物：角色鲜活，他们的喜怒哀乐能轻易牵动读者的情绪。
- 文笔：细腻而不啰嗦，画面感强，代入感十足。
整体完成度很高，五星支持实至名归。[微笑][微笑]","text_exts":[{"e":53,"s":51,"text":"张弛","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413058790A338F0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610061738102735678%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227582991555137391678%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771857607,"group_id":"7582991555137391678","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"懒得理懒得讲","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+GAU5PWq5gjUeFKpFCW2FU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/feaccd2d27c546cdb6b46b8cf9c4d3d5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705186&x-signature=z04AAFWzaiPKHF19O7d2o8sjfJs%3D","user_id":"53659229789","user_name":"番茄、爱吃土豆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53659229789","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582991555137391678","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市】+【商业】+【科技】+【前期互联网，后期实业】
徐欢得到一个来自高等文明的科技系统，里面包含了各种各样的高科技。
坑爹的是想要兑换黑科技，需要庞大的财富值。
好在国内互联网刚刚起步，属于站在风口上的都能起飞。
凭借着对未来的先知先觉，徐欢决定截胡企鹅，积累第一桶金，解锁科技，提前布局移动智能手机市场。
都屠龙的少年终成恶龙，人人纷纷怒骂寰宇科技是互联网毒瘤，阻碍了科学技术的发展。
待3G普及，寰宇首次推出自研操作系统，重新定义智能手机，光刻机、芯片纷纷实现突破性进展。
待到5G降临时，徐欢真正显露出獠牙、量子存储、虚拟现实、人工智能等一个个未来科技，在寰宇手中落地生根。
你能想象，在虚拟世界中进行真实购物，一日之间环游世界等等。
虚拟游戏不再是小说中幻想的场景，一个个虚拟游戏照进现实。
癌症、白血病等困扰人类生命的疑难杂症，将不再是难题。
胶囊房屋的出现，意味年轻人不用再背负着高额的房贷。
一项项高科技，从寰宇集团中落地生根。
直到此时，众人才明白误会寰宇科技，原来他是用我们的钱去研究科学去了。
当徐欢接受采访时，淡淡说道：“科技不是高高在上，而是服务与人民。”

:5123,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13452,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3581},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612119948098814782","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"己看到最新章，总体阅读下来，没有以额外的戏份写开头，后续也没有到处都是美女，校花，打脑，这些无脑剧情，阅读体验极佳。
感觉作者每一步都是有计划的写，但还是给作者一些小建议，科技不是发展越快越好，你科技跟上了，社会并没有跟上，后期这会有很大的割裂感，部分细节该写还是得写，这样不仅能增加字数，而且读者代入感也会增加。
还是希望作者越写越好，加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772337472,"group_id":"7582991555137391678","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"去","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/ORcYE8AiA8LxzJbs1a4RR7kKyYUS7/V+2csslTp+mD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0ac4b5189dcb48b7a188e737f25f3e81~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709341&x-signature=CXi7%2BsksOtWOaGXRyTJ%2BSkPLDhw%3D","user_id":"2837210295436168","user_name":"书白农"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2837210295436168","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582991555137391678","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市】+【商业】+【科技】+【前期互联网，后期实业】
